title: Get a Quote — PlausiDen LLC
description: Free intake consultation. Tell us about your stack, your threat model, your timeline — we listen first, scope second, propose third.

sections.title: Tell us about your stack.
sections.lede: Thirty minutes, no obligation. We listen first, scope second, propose third. No sales drip, no scope inflation, no commitment to engage.

background.alt: Wide editorial photograph evoking proposal-writing + scoping

items.definition: Send a short email (or call, or encrypted inquiry). Cover what system, what constraint, what outcome you want. One paragraph is fine. The more specific, the faster we triage.
Thirty-minute call. We ask about your team, your threat model, your audit obligations, and your timeline. We do not pitch the platform during this call — the goal is understanding, not selling.

Within five business days, you receive a written proposal: scope, deliverables, timeline, fixed fee or hourly with cap, named engineer. You can accept, decline, or counter — no pressure either direction.
Signed engagement letter, scoped access provisioned, written change-control protocol, audit chain initialized. The engagement begins on the date we mutually pick — usually within two weeks.

sections.body: Free does not mean unscoped. The 30-minute intake call is a real intake call — we want to understand your problem so the proposal is accurate.

items.value: Or at least one person who can speak to budget, scope, and timeline. Multi-stakeholder calls are fine; pure information-gathering calls are not the best use of either side's time.

items.key: An honest description of the problem
items.value: Not the polished pitch you give the board. The actual mess. We don't judge; we scope what we hear.

items.key: Threat model or audit obligation, if any
items.value: HIPAA / SOC 2 / PCI-DSS / GDPR / state privacy laws — mention them up front. Half the scope decision flips on compliance scope.
Even "under $10k" vs "over $100k" helps. We won't pitch beyond your range; we'll either scope to fit or tell you the problem doesn't fit our model.

sections.caption: Thirty minutes. We listen. You decide.

sections.title: Email team@plausiden.com.
sections.lede: Subject line: "Quote inquiry — <one-line problem>". We reply within two business days.
